This attack hits directly above Dedede only on frame 40. Hammer comes down on 43. Shockwave on 44. Charge hold is frame 33. Multiple hitboxes: an aerial only hitbox that does 0%, sweetspot near tip of hammer, weak hit near Dedede.

Startup and total frames refer to minimum usage. 19 endlag after extended usage. Can inhale projectiles starting on frame 14 and involuntarily spit them back.Gains invulnerability for 14 frames after the 4th frame of inhaling a character/item out. For example, if a character gets grabbed as soon as inhale comes out, (f14) the i-frames would be 18-32. Invulnerability informationfrom @Landslide___ on Twitter.

Cancelling incurs 30 frames landing lag. Invulnerable on frame 18-21. Super Armor (infinite %) on frames 22-34 and then 69-76. Leg intangibility frame 69-landing. Landing hitbox on frame 3—4. Stars on frame 5—24. Hitbox 69—landing.
